news.headline: Should England focus on Messi or Argentina's midfield?
news.description: Should England focus on Messi or Argentina's midfield?

news.headline: World Cup: Grades for every eliminated team as each exits the tournament
news.description: When the World Cup ends, 47 teams will have been eliminated, and we're grading every one on how its run compared with expectations.

news.headline: Spain's Lamine Yamal issues World Cup final warning: 'New York we're coming for you'
news.description: Lamine Yamal is looking forward to take New York by storm after helping Spain reach the World Cup final with a 2-0 win against France.

news.headline: Argentina vice president before World Cup semifinal: England are 'invaders'
news.description: England have been described as "invaders" and "usurping pirates" by Argentina's vice president ahead of the teams' World Cup semifinal clash.

news.headline: 2026 FIFA World Cup match schedule: Fixtures, results, features
news.description: Check out all the fixtures, features and results for the 2026 FIFA World Cup in the United States, Mexico and Canada.

news.headline: Why are there hydration breaks at the 2026 World Cup, and why has FIFA been criticised?
news.description: All 104 matches at the 2026 World Cup are stopping for two hydration breaks. Why have they been stipulated by FIFA, and why have they been criticised?
